title: Looking for Category Manager at Lenskart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Lenskart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
